summary: Revised session journal refactor plan: 10 phases (0-9) with TDD gates. Prior plan's P0-P9 was restructured because wiring was missing despite handlers existing. New plan focuses on: (1) kill legacy calls, (2) wire existing handlers, (3) wire session lifecycle, (4) restructure output paths, (5) journey-events markdown, (6) session resolver extraction, (7) sub-session linking, (8) legacy deprecation, (9) final verification.
keyFindings: All handler files EXIST (chat-message, tool-execution, event, text-complete, compaction) but chat-message and tool-execution are NOT wired in opencode-plugin.ts — this is the single biggest gap
writeDiagnosticLog and upsertSessionInspectionExport are STILL CALLED in opencode-plugin.ts despite being deprecated — Phase 1 removes them
consolidated-writer.ts is fully functional with all exports (initSession, addTurn, addEvent, incrementCounter, updateStatus, linkSubSession) — no rebuild needed

17+ test files are in RED phase importing from non-existent modules (parser/*, session-writer/*, writers/index-writer, writers/synthesizer) — these tests define the spec but cannot run until modules are created
14 of 20+ user-specified event types have NO SDK hook — cannot be wired without custom event bus (forbidden by AGENTS.md). Gap must be documented.
blockedRoutes: message.updated, message.part.updated, session.diff, session.status, session.updated — no SDK hook exists, cannot wire
file.edited, file.watcher.updated, lsp.client.diagnostics, lsp.updated — no SDK hook exists
todo.updated, tui.prompt.append, tui.command.execute, tui.toast.show — no SDK hook exists
Existing 76+ session directories — migration strategy not defined, needs architect decision
recommendedNextAction: Execute Phase 0 (baseline verification) then Phase 1 (kill redundancy). Both are low-risk and unblock the entire plan.
architectDecisionsNeeded: Rename event-tracker/ to session-journal/? (cosmetic, affects all imports)
Delete or deprecate legacy modules? (breaking change for consumers)
Hierarchy JSON schema format? (needed before Phase 7)
Migration strategy for existing 76+ session directories? (needed before Phase 4)
